LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS' "MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, FROM DEFENDANTS" IS GRANTED IN PART. I ADOPT THE JUDGE PRO TEM'S WELL-REASONED REPORT AND RECOMMENDATIONS. DEFENDANT MIKE CELESTE'S PERSONNEL FILE - EXCLUDING FINANCIAL AND MEDICAL INFORMATION AND TIME RECORDS - SHALL BE SUBMITTED FOR MY IN CAMERA REVIEW. I WILL ORDER RELEASE OF RECORDS RELEVANT TO THE LAWSUIT, WITH A DESIGNATION OF "CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION" UNDER THE JULY 22, 2020 PROTECTIVE ORDER. NO SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

Off Calendar Oct-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANTOINE FISHER, TONYA LETT, JAYEL WHITTED MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS

APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ryan Vlasak (415.835.6777; rvlasak@bvlawsf.com) for Plaintiff.
Trevor J. Koski (Trevor.J.Koski@sfcityatty.org) for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiffs' "motion to compel further responses to plaintiffs' request for production of documents, set one, from defendants" is granted in part. I adopt the judge pro tem's well-reasoned report and recommendations. Defendant Mike Celeste's personnel file - excluding financial and medical information and time records - shall be submitted for my in camera review. I will order release of records relevant to the lawsuit, with a designation of "Confidential Information" under the July 22, 2020 protective order. No sanctions are awarded.

order signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
